reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio pequeña pero atienden bien y nunca he tenido inconvenientes a destacar. Se encuentra ubicada en el centro. De fácil acceso

(Translated by Google)
It's a small gas station, but the service is good and I've never had any problems. It's located downtown and easily accessible.

reviews.comment:
De las opciones en Villa es la más conveniente. Si solo paran para comprar café o ir al baño, conviene estacionar en la esquina de los bomberos.

(Translated by Google)
Of the options in Villa, this is the most convenient. If you're only stopping to buy coffee or use the restroom, it's best to park on the corner by the fire station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVNTdEY3lnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pedimos empanadas para llevar. Nos entregaron empanadas fritas, algo que nunca pedimos ya que queríamos al horno (las comunes). Al momento de hacer el reclamo, no nos tomaron la queja y tuvimos que llevarnos las empanadas fritas. La dueña un desastre, la mesera muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
We ordered empanadas to go. They gave us fried empanadas, which we never ordered since we wanted baked (the regular kind). When we complained, they wouldn't take our complaint and we had to take the fried empanadas home. The owner was awful, but the waitress was very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVNjlPX1BnEAE
